Petition For First And Final Account And Report Of Administrator; For Settlement Thereof; For Final Distribution; For Allowance Of Statutory Compensation To Administrator And Attorneys; For Reimbursement Of Costs To Attorneys; For Extraordinary Fees Of Administrator And Attorneys
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Terese M. Raddie, Esq. for Stevan Chandler (Administrator).

Ms. Raddie stated that it was alleged that the funds were not placed in an interest bearing account, that the funds were actually placed in an interest bearing account, and that the $500.00 was put back in the account after November 8, 2018. Ms. Raddie addressed the request to reduce the bond noting that they asked for a $30,000.00 reserve plus $500.00. Additional brief argument by Ms. Raddie with regard to the bond was held. At the conclusion of Ms. Raddie's argument, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Continued To Jun-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Glenn Mitchell. Robert Ferris for and with Renee Romero.

Ms. Rasch stated that the property is one unit out of three with a tenants in common interest, that she is not sure how the mortgage is being paid and that there are $55,000.00 in arrears to the Age Song facility. Reference was made to the June 9, 2014 hearing on the petition to terminate in conservatorship case number PCN-11-294213. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions (not in agreement) with regard to appointment of a private professional fiduciary and were asked to step out of the courtroom to discuss the matter. Upon returning, Ms. Rasch stated that they have agreed to a private fiduciary, requested a two week continuance to select someone and stated that she will then petition for appointment of a Special Administrator. Both petitions for probate were continued to June 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Renee Rommero in Propria Persona. Melba Garland (Niece) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Rommero requested time to retain Counsel. Ms. Garland expressed concern about her Aunt's wishes not being represented. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to April 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will advise Ms. Rasch.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
